decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id 'corridor_utica-av' matches an existing canonical registry record with identical street (Utica Avenue), limits (Carroll St. to Church Ave.), borough (Brooklyn), and the observation's source_id (2011_09_15_sbs_utica_cb8_9_17) is already in that record's source_ids. The record alias 'corridor_utica-avenue-carrol-church-2011' directly mirrors the observation label. No different record is a closer match — the observation resolves to its own base_record_id, so decision is 'new'.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Study Area: Carroll St. to Church Ave.
